CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, position INT);
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id INT, position INT);
SELECT bitstring_agg(position, 1, 42) FROM test_table2; -- Expecting Out of Range Error;
WITH temp AS (SELECT position FROM test_table WHERE position >= 1 AND position <= 42) SELECT bitstring_agg(position, 1, 42) FROM temp;
CREATE TABLE all_positions (pos INT CHECK (pos BETWEEN 1 AND 42));
SELECT bitstring_agg(pos, 1, 42) FROM mixed_positions WHERE pos BETWEEN 1 AND 42;
SELECT bitstring_agg(position, 1, 42) FROM (SELECT position FROM test_table UNION ALL SELECT position FROM test_table2) AS combined;
SELECT bitstring_agg(position, 1, 42) FROM (SELECT position FROM test_table WHERE position < 50) AS filtered WHERE position IS NOT NULL;
